Engineering Heavy Duty Trailers & Tippers

Built for strength. Engineered for reliability. Nexfra Manufacturing delivers industry-leading commercial vehicles designed to withstand the toughest operations across India.

01

Premium Materials

We use high-tensile ST52 and Hardox wear-resistant steel for maximum cargo capacity and lifetime.

02

Welding Integrity

Every structural weld undergoes stringent ultrasonic testing to eliminate joint failure risks.

03

IS Standard Compliant

Fully compliant with ARAI and Indian Road Standards for safety, braking, and load distribution.

Who We Are

Strength. Reliability. Precision.

Nexfra Manufacturing India Pvt. Ltd. is a premier heavy engineering fabricator specializing in advanced trailer and tipper body manufacturing. Based in our state-of-the-art facility, we deploy robotic welding, CNC cutting, and computerized quality checks to deliver transport solutions that never compromise.

We serve large logistics companies, mining operators, and infrastructure development giants who require vehicles that can run 24/7 without structural fatigue. Our design philosophy combines lightweight engineering with rugged durability to maximize payloads.

Robotic & Automated Welding
Hardox Certified Body Shop
Automated Shot Blasting
Custom Built Templates

"Our mission is to build infrastructure support systems that outlast the roads they traverse."

— Chief Operations Officer, Nexfra
Our Fleet

Heavy-Duty Product Range

Engineered to standards of extreme durability. Select a category below to see technical specifications and configure quotations.

Flat Bed Trailer

High-strength cargo trailer designed for heavy container transport and machinery haulage.

  • Beam: Submerged Arc Welded Main Beam
  • Axles: 3 x 13T heavy-duty axles
  • Suspension: Heavy duty mechanical leaf spring
  • Floor: 4mm Chequered Plate
Base Price: ₹8,50,000

Tip Trailer

Advanced tipping semi-trailer equipped with multi-stage heavy-duty hydraulic cylinders.

  • Capacity: 30 CBM to 40 CBM payload
  • Cylinder: High-performance Multi-stage Hydraulic
  • Structure: High strength wear-resistant steel
  • Axles: Tandem/Tridem options
Base Price: ₹14,20,000

Box Body Tipper

Rigid chassis tipper body designed for sand, gravel, aggregate, and dry bulk hauling.

  • Capacity Options: 14 to 25 CBM templates
  • Floor: 8mm heavy-duty MS floor
  • Side Walls: 6mm thick reinforced panels
  • Mechanism: Underbody hydraulic hoist / Front end
Base Price: ₹7,80,000

Rock Body Tipper

Extreme-durability heavy tipper utilizing certified Hardox wear plate for mining operations.

  • Steel: Hardox 450 Grade certified
  • Floor: 10mm high-impact wear steel
  • Breakers: Tailored rock breakers integrated
  • Application: Heavy mining, rock, iron ore
Base Price: ₹11,50,000
Workflow

The Manufacturing Standard

Six rigorous phases of industrial manufacturing that guarantee structural integrity and long operating lifetimes.

01

CNC Plasma Cutting

High-precision computer-guided plasma cutters slice heavy carbon steel plates matching the exact template dimensions. Error margin is under 0.5mm.

02

Jig Fabrication

Steel beams are aligned on massive, robust jigs. This ensures that chassis tracking, alignment, and load distribution match critical design plans.

03

Robotic Welding

Chassis members are joined using high-amperage robotic multi-pass welders. Important stress points are reinforced manually by certified welders.

04

Shot Blasting & Priming

Chassis are shot blasted in an automated chamber to remove mill scale and rust, preparing the steel for a robust epoxy-zinc rich primer coat.

05

Polyurethane Painting

Two layers of premium industrial polyurethane topcoat are applied inside a heated spray booth, creating a tough barrier against chemical corrosion.

06

QC & Suspension Rigging

Axles, air braking systems, and suspensions are rigged, followed by load-testing, weld UT checks, and ARAI-compliance inspections.

Sectors

Industries We Empower

Nexfra vehicles operate in the country's most demanding sectors, delivering efficiency and reducing down-time.

Logistics & Transport

Engineered for high-volume flatbed freight and side-wall bulk transport across national highways.

Mining & Quarrying

Hardox tipper bodies built to resist extreme impact from rocks, ore, and gravel in open-cast mines.

Infrastructure & Roads

Tip trailers and concrete aggregates tippers supporting road building and bridge constructions.

Agriculture & Bulk

Specially customized trailers for bulk sugar cane, grain, and general agricultural logistics.

Trust

What Our Customers Say

"Nexfra's rock bodies have been operating in our mining site for 2 years without a single structural failure. The Hardox plate steel is highly durable under intense loading cycles."

Harish Mehta

Director, Gati Mining & Minerals

"We upgraded our cargo fleet to Nexfra Flat Bed trailers. The main chassis beam tracking is perfectly balanced, which has reduced our tyre wear by nearly 18%."

Rajesh K.

Head of Logistics, Golden Roadlines

"The Quotation Builder and ERP coordination are impressive. We requested custom modifications to a Side Wall trailer, received the quote instantly, and order tracking was highly transparent."

Sandeep Singh

Operations Head, V-Trans Cargo India
